/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/lsystems.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/lsystems.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o lsystems  thirdparty/raylib-6.0/raylib/libraylib.a -lpthread /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libGLU.so /usr/lib64/librt.a -lm -ldl -lm /usr/lib64/libSM.so /usr/lib64/libICE.so /usr/lib64/libX11.so /usr/lib64/libXext.so -lgcc_s_asneeded -lgcc_s_asneeded
